values: The stores are running low and the next harvest is weeks away
We lost most of the crop to blight and need to replenish before winter
The settlement is growing faster than the fields can keep up with
A merchant promised a good price if we can fill a large order in time
The communal stores were raided and the families are starting to worry
The healer needs fresh ingredients and the garden was trampled
We promised provisions to a traveling caravan and came up short
The livestock got into the food stores. We need to replace what was lost
A feast is being planned and nobody thought to check if we had enough
The flooding damaged the root cellar and spoiled half of what was stored
The cookhouse is bare and the settlement council is getting questions
A neighboring settlement asked for help after their own stores failed
The preservation barrels cracked and we lost everything inside
We trade surplus for tools and right now there is no surplus
The children have been hungry and I will not let that continue
